name: @wxyc/legacy-mirror-reconcile
description: WXYC recurring cron (BS#1707): self-heal tubafrenzy mirror rows orphaned when the one-shot res.finish mirror attempt was skipped (flag off at go-live, transient tubafrenzy failure, mid-show flag flip, or a BS restart mid-request). Two DB-durable, all-or-nothing sweeps re-drive shows (legacy_show_id IS NULL) then their entries + signoff (legacy_entry_id IS NULL); partially-mirrored shows are detected and reported for manual remediation, never auto-appended. Reuses @wxyc/legacy-mirror for byte-identical payloads; per-DJ backend-mirror flag gate; pg_try_advisory_lock single-flight; cooperative pause defers when DJs are active.
